source: reviewed/Ars Magica - Definitive Edition (Core Rules).md#stories (confirmed vs Hooks / Tales of Mythic Europe)

elements.name: Vis source contested
elements.summary: A vis source is discovered, drying up, tainted, or being stolen/contested by another magus.
elements.as_thread: Secure or settle the contested vis source.

elements.name: Tribunal looms
elements.summary: A Tribunal looms and rival covenants court allies — siding with one makes enemies of another.
elements.as_thread: Navigate the coming Tribunal and its alliances.

elements.name: A Code breach
elements.summary: A magus is framed for (or genuinely caught in) a serious breach of the Hermetic Code.
elements.as_thread: Prove innocence or expose the breach.

elements.name: Mundane authority threatens the covenant
elements.summary: A lord, bishop, or abbot threatens, sues for, or seizes covenant land.
elements.as_thread: Defend the covenant's lands and rights.

elements.name: Rival covenant harassment
elements.summary: A rival or neighboring covenant wages low-grade harassment that stays within the letter of the Code.
elements.as_thread: Counter the rival without breaking the Code yourself.

elements.name: A faerie bargain
elements.summary: A faerie offers a bargain, plays a game with the covenant, or abducts someone into its court.
elements.as_thread: Win, refuse, or unravel the faerie's bargain.

elements.name: An infernal temptation
elements.summary: A diabolist, a corrupted ally, or an infernal vis source is uncovered; a demon tempts a member.
elements.as_thread: Resist and root out the infernal corruption.

elements.name: A Church conflict
elements.summary: A bishop preaches against heretics and marches to 'investigate' the covenant.
elements.as_thread: Avert or survive the Church's scrutiny.

elements.name: A magical intrusion
elements.summary: A magical beast or roused ancient spirit intrudes on the covenant or a nearby village.
elements.as_thread: Deal with the magical beast or spirit on its terms.

elements.name: A lost Hermetic text or Mystery
elements.summary: A lost Hermetic text, forgotten Mystery, or fragment of ancient/non-Hermetic magic comes to light.
elements.as_thread: Recover the lost text or Mystery before a rival does.

elements.name: A plea for help
elements.summary: A villager, noble, or abbey comes to the covenant begging assistance against a monster, famine, or theft.
elements.as_thread: Answer (or refuse) the plea, and bear the consequences.

elements.name: A Redcap's message
elements.summary: A Redcap arrives with Order news, a summons, a Wizard's War declaration, or a sensitive package.
elements.as_thread: Act on the news the Redcap brings.

elements.name: A covenfolk crisis
elements.summary: A grog or covenfolk crisis flares — rebellion, a death, possession, or a covenfolk caught spying.
elements.as_thread: Resolve the crisis among the covenant's people.

elements.name: Warping or Twilight strikes
elements.summary: Warping or Twilight strikes a magus, or the covenant's aura surges, fades, or slips into a regio.
elements.as_thread: Cope with the warping, Twilight, or shifting aura.

elements.name: An apprentice matter
elements.summary: An apprentice or Gauntlet matter arises — finding, training, losing, or testing an apprentice.
elements.as_thread: Settle the apprentice or Gauntlet matter.
